title: ANS weight compression: 1.6 MB (13.9%) lossless savings over LZMA
author: OE-GOD
novel_contributions: Replaces LZMA with per-layer rANS entropy coding for int6-quantized weights
Achieves lossless compression savings of 1.6 MB (13.9%) over LZMA
Uses exact per-layer histograms to approach the theoretical entropy minimum
Provides a standalone analysis/compression tool for quantized model artifacts
Systematically evaluates and rejects delta encoding, embedding factorization, and spatial correlation as major sources of wasted budget
